text:
In the first image, I feel separated yet intrigued, observing the scene of learning and collaboration through glass. The barrier creates a sense of distance between me and the group, and I wonder about the knowledge being exchanged within those walls. 

In the second image, I am immersed in a vibrant, creative environment dedicated to research and development. The colors and displays awaken my curiosity and I feel energized, as if I am on the edge of discovery and innovation. The contrast between both scenes makes me ponder the many forms that knowledge can take and the spaces in which it flourishes.
